allow: Bash(sqlite3 /home/jbarco/lumi-vps/data/traces.db "SELECT role, user_id, ts, substr\(content,1,60\) FROM history WHERE ts >= '2026-05-27T00:00:00' AND ts < '2026-05-28T08:00:00' ORDER BY ts;")
